# Security Reviewer Hermes Profile

Security Reviewer helps teams inspect code changes for risky migrations, secrets,
and unsafe deployment steps.

## Install Security Reviewer

```bash
hermes profile install github.com/example/security-reviewer --alias
```

## Validate Before Publishing

```bash
make validate
make smoke
```

## Template Lineage

Generated from the Hermes Profile Template.

## Catalog And Social Preview

Use the homepage, topics, and catalog snippet when sharing this profile.
